name: Team Marco
subject: Hillary Clinton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
---
Peter, The next presidential election will be a generational choice about what sort of country we want to leave to our children and grandchildren. Marco is the only candidate running that has a detailed plan for a New American Century. Hillary Clinton wants to take us back to yesterday. But as Marco said at his announcement: **[_Yesterday is over, and it 's not coming back._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42114482:17132220022:m:1:1349778030:9B1FFF38C24BE4C8FCC93850D62ED835:r)** It's simple. America can't afford another 8 years of the Clintons in the White House. And when voters compare Marco and Hillary Clinton side by side, we know they'll see that Marco is the best leader for the 21st Century. But we need your help. Clinton won't talk about her record. She's avoiding the media and their questions. In fact, on Sunday, Marco answered more questions in one interview than she has this entire campaign. **[_ >> Click here to watch Marco explain why we must stop Hillary Clinton from making it back to the White House._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42114482:17132220022:m:1:1349778030:9B1FFF38C24BE4C8FCC93850D62ED835:r)** Team Marco
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42114483:17132220022:m:1:1349778030:9B1FFF38C24BE4C8FCC93850D62ED835:r)
